script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== ts ==='; date -u +%FT%TZ
echo '=== resolve actual responder path from systemd ==='
for svc in heather-responder kaye-responder gabriel-responder; do
  echo "--- $svc ---"
  systemctl show ${svc}.service --property=User,Group,ExecStart,WorkingDirectory --no-pager
done
echo '=== heather diag (corrected paths under /home/heather) ==='
echo '-- service status --'
systemctl is-active heather-bot.service heather-responder.service
echo '-- responder uptime --'
pid=$(systemctl show heather-responder.service --property=MainPID --value)
ps -o etimes= -p "$pid" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ' | xargs -I{} echo "  responder uptime: {}s"
echo '-- responder source on disk --'
ls -la /home/heather/heather-responder.py 2>/dev/null
echo '-- inbound/outbound mtimes --'
ls -la /home/heather/.heather-bot/activities.jsonl /home/heather/.heather-bot/outbound.jsonl 2>/dev/null
echo '-- responder-errors.log tail --'
tail -15 /home/heather/.heather-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null
echo '-- debug.log: stat + entry count --'
ls -la /home/heather/.heather-bot/responder-debug.log 2>/dev/null
echo "  entry count: $(grep -c '^=====' /home/heather/.heather-bot/responder-debug.log 2>/dev/null)"
echo '-- last 30 debug.log lines --'
tail -30 /home/heather/.heather-bot/responder-debug.log 2>/dev/null
echo '-- injection markers in responder source --'
grep -nE '^# === [A-Z_]+_V[0-9]+(_VAULT)?(_REBIND)? (BEGIN|END|\(auto-injected)' /home/heather/heather-responder.py 2>/dev/null
echo '-- py_compile syntax check --'
python3 -m py_compile /home/heather/heather-responder.py 2>&1 | head -10
echo '-- heather token .env --'
ls -la /etc/claude-tokens/heather.env 2>/dev/null
wc -c /etc/claude-tokens/heather.env 2>/dev/null
echo '===END==='
